name: Cappuccino Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Crush chocolate wafer cookies and mix with ground cinnamon.
3. Press mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
4. In a bowl, beat light cream cheese until smooth.
5. Gradually add sugar and cocoa powder to the cream cheese, mixing well.
6. Add nonfat egg substitute (equivalent to 2 eggs) to the mixture and stir.
7. Mix in nonfat sour cream substitute, coffee liqueur, and vanilla extract.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake for about 30 minutes or until set.
10. Spread remaining sour cream substitute over the top of the cake.
11. Return the cake to the oven for 1 minute to glaze the surface.
12. Allow the cake to cool to room temperature and then chill thoroughly, covered.
13. Remove from the springform pan before serving.
14. Dust the top with cocoa powder in a decorative pattern, if desired.
Yield: 12-16 servings
